## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `...`
2. Enter `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include full error output if available.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- Node.js version (if applicable): [e.g. 20.10.0]
- KairuAI version: [e.g. v1.0.0]

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or logs that might help.
